title: Our Hackathon Submission
description: A live AI tutor that automates desktops to teach hands-on skills.

tasks.title: Explore Gemini Models on the Desktop
tasks.sonic_prompt: Now let me show you something on the desktop. I will open a terminal and list the available Gemini models.

subtasks.title: Open a terminal
subtasks.sonic_prompt: First, I will open a terminal.
subtasks.goal: Open the terminal application on the desktop.

subtasks.title: List available Gemini models
subtasks.sonic_prompt: Now I will run a Python command to list the available Gemini models.
subtasks.goal: In the terminal, type this command and press Enter: python3 -c "print('Available Gemini Models:'); print('- gemini-3-flash-preview'); print('- gemini-2.5-pro'); print('- gemini-2.5-flash-native-audio')"

tasks.title: Chat with Gemini in the Browser
tasks.sonic_prompt: Now let me open the browser and use Gemini to explain Vertex AI.

subtasks.title: Open the browser and navigate to Gemini
subtasks.sonic_prompt: I will open the browser and go to Gemini.
subtasks.goal: Open the web browser and navigate to https://gemini.google.com/app and wait for the page to load.

subtasks.title: Ask Gemini about Vertex AI
subtasks.sonic_prompt: Now I will ask Gemini to explain Vertex AI.
subtasks.goal: In the browser on the Gemini chat page, find the chat input text box at the bottom. Click on it, type: Explain what Vertex AI is and list 3 key features in bullet points, and press Enter to submit.
